text: RT @citizentvkenya: Rigathi Gachagua: I’m told they want to try and overturn the results and if they can’t, they cause chaos so that the election is cancelled so that they get another opportunity to repeat the elections. Even if they do, the results will remain the same. That is the Kikuyu nation for you

We know that it is the Kenya Kwanza Fascist State that mobilises the lumpen class into temporary militias with stones, machete and matchsticks to disrupt people's mass actions in the streets. The boys in blue are the ones who always bring violence during peaceful demonstrations. We shall deal with both of them !!!
